steps.title: Factor the common term
steps.content: Both terms, $16x^3y^2$ and $14xy$, share a greatest common factor of $2xy$. Factor that out first.

steps.title: Use a quick Desmos check
steps.content:
To check the factored form, test two ordered pairs at once:
$$x_1=[2,3]$$
$$y_1=[3,4]$$
$$o_1=16x_1^3y_1^2+14x_1y_1$$
$$b_1=2x_1y_1(8x_1^2y_1+7)$$
The two output lists match.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: $2xy(8x^2y+7)$ is choice B, so B is correct.
